title: Design System: 吐司工坊 · Toast Workshop

buff-info.purpose: Buff annotations, inline hints, did-you-know cards

display.purpose: Hero eyebrow titles, page-level italic headers. Bakery handwriting.

title.purpose: Section titles, hero highlight category headings.

body.purpose: Default UI body. Buttons, cells, form labels.

body-serif.purpose: Editorial reading surfaces — Changelog hero highlights, About-page paragraphs.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards, ghost buttons, ledger rows on hover. Pairs with translateY(-1px).

shadows.name: hero-ambient
shadows.purpose: Dashboard hero, Changelog hero panel. Soft warm glow, low alpha.

shadows.name: inset-highlight
shadows.purpose: 1px white-ish inner top stroke on hero cards. Top-edge of paper sheet catching light.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover lift, fade, slide).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Single CTA per surface. Toast gold fill, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.65 0.18 65); color: oklch(0.99 0.01 90); font-family: 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.15 75); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px color-mix(in srgb, oklch(0.65 0.18 65) 18%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.18 65); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Cream-hover fill, no lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.50 0.03 60); font-family: 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.65 0.04 65 / 0.30); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.025 85); color: oklch(0.28 0.04 55); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default panel surface. Flat at rest, 14px corner.
components.html:
配方名稱

展開素材樹，採購清單一次給。
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.975 0.018 85); border: 1px solid oklch(0.65 0.04 65 / 0.30); border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px color-mix(in srgb, oklch(0.65 0.18 65) 18%, transparent); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.28 0.04 55); margin: 0 0 8px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.50 0.03 60); margin: 0; line-height: 1.7; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Default form input. 36px height, gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(0.975 0.018 85); color: oklch(0.28 0.04 55); font-family: 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.65 0.04 65 / 0.30); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; height: 36px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.65 0.03 60); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.65 0.18 65); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.65 0.18 65 / 0.18); }

components.name: Active Chip
components.description: Selected pill (locale, filter). Gold fill, cream text.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: oklch(0.94 0.025 85); color: oklch(0.50 0.03 60); font-family: 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: none; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-chip:hover { color: oklch(0.28 0.04 55); } .ds-chip-active { background: oklch(0.65 0.18 65); color: oklch(0.975 0.018 85); font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Eyebrow Pill
components.description: Toast-gold-glow micro-label above hero titles. Fira Code uppercase, wide letter-spacing.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.65 0.18 65 / 0.18); color: oklch(0.65 0.18 65); font-family: 'Fira Code', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; }

components.name: Editorial Hero
components.description: Signature editorial hero pattern: eyebrow + Cormorant italic title + gold rule + serif body.
components.html:
本期 · April · 四月

v2.4.0 "Open Counter"

Dashboard 寬螢幕版面、模擬器 Cockpit、更新日誌 Parchment Poet 重設計。
components.css: .ds-hero { background: oklch(0.975 0.018 85); border: 1px solid oklch(0.65 0.04 65 / 0.30); border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px 28px; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px oklch(0.40 0.05 60 / 0.06), inset 0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / 0.6); } .ds-hero-eyebrow { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Noto Serif TC', serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: oklch(0.55 0.14 60); margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-hero-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Noto Serif TC', serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(0.28 0.04 55); margin: 0; } .ds-hero-codename { font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.50 0.03 60); font-size: 0.78em; } .ds-hero-rule { margin: 8px 0 18px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.65 0.18 65) 0, oklch(0.65 0.18 65) 56px, oklch(0.65 0.04 65 / 0.32) 56px, oklch(0.65 0.04 65 / 0.32) 100%); } .ds-hero-body { font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.85; color: oklch(0.35 0.04 55); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
吐司工坊是一間早晨剛開門的麵包店：陽光從側窗灑進來、烘焙紙、玻璃果醬罐排成一列、剛揉好的麵糰在木桌上，櫃台上有一塊手寫黑板。Cream 色主背景是早晨的烘焙紙，吐司金強調色是櫃台燈下的麵包邊緣，多色語意（可可 / 草莓醬 / 抹茶）是排隊的果醬罐，Cormorant italic 是黑板上的手寫引言。

吐司工坊拒絕同類 FFXIV 工具的 dark navy / purple gradient 配色。它拒絕「冷冰冰的科技工具」氣氛，拒絕「凌晨工程師專用 dashboard」的視覺常規。它的個性是溫暖、親切、輕鬆，加上一點手藝人的低調自豪。

主打功能是「批量製作」（Batch Crafting）；視覺權重也跟著走：Dashboard 把它做成 hero 切片區塊，sidebar 把它放在 Tier 1。
keyCharacteristics: Light first：奶油白 cream 主背景貫穿整站，dark mode 是次要 mode（深暖灰 + 暖棕 sidebar，不是冷藍）
Full palette 多色語意：四種烘焙食物色（吐司金 / 可可 / 草莓醬 / 抹茶）對應四個產品功能
Editorial serif accents：Cormorant Garamond italic + Noto Serif TC + Noto Sans TC + Fira Code 四軌字體分工嚴格
手作感無傾斜：hover 微抬升、紙質紋理、Cormorant italic 引言；從不傾斜任何元件
流程精簡：每頁完成一件事的完整流程

rules.name: The Jam-Jar Rule
rules.body: Each functional hue (cocoa, strawberry, matcha, buff-info) belongs to exactly one product zone. Hue IS wayfinding.

rules.name: The Sunlight, Not Spotlight Rule
rules.body: Toast-gold is used for ≤10% of surface. Primary CTA, focus ring, active state, nothing more.

rules.name: The No-Gray Rule
rules.body: Every neutral tints toward warm 55-90 hue with chroma 0.018-0.04. Pure gray is forbidden. #fff and #000 never appear.

rules.name: The Four-Track Rule
rules.body: Every text element belongs to exactly one of: Cormorant (display/italic), Noto Serif TC (titles/editorial), Noto Sans TC (UI body), Fira Code (numbers/mono).

rules.name: The Italic-Is-Sacred Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond italic is reserved for moments — page eyebrow titles, version codenames, month markers, taglines. Never UI body.

rules.name: The 65-Character Rule
rules.body: Body text caps at 65–75ch measure. Changelog 920px container honors this.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Touched Rule
rules.body: Cards, panels, list rows do NOT carry shadow at rest. First shadow appears as hover or focus response.

rules.name: The Hero-Earns-Atmosphere Rule
rules.body: Hero zones (one or two per page) may layer ambient shadow + paper-noise + inset highlight. Outside heroes, paper-noise and ambient shadow are forbidden.

rules.name: The Floating-Is-Heavy Rule
rules.body: Dropdowns, popovers, dialogs carry clearly heavier shadow (16-48px blur, 0.4 alpha).

dos: Do keep Toast Gold under 10% of any given screen.
Do map every functional zone to its assigned jam-jar hue: Crafting → Cocoa, Market → Strawberry, Gathering → Matcha.
Do lead Cormorant italic with italic intent: eyebrows, quotes, codenames, month markers — moments only.
Do keep cards flat at rest. Lift them 1-2px with accent-tinted shadow on hover.
Do use OKLCH for every color value.
Do tint every neutral toward warm 55-90 hue.
Do use Fira Code for every number, version, date, gil amount.
Do keep dark mode warm: deep brown surfaces, warm cream text. Never cool blue/gray.
donts: Don't use dark navy or purple gradients. tnze.yyyy.games and beherw FFXIV_Market are the named anti-references.
Don't use neon accents or glassmorphism on dark mode.
Don't put Cormorant italic inside dense UI: buttons, table cells, form labels.
Don't mix font families inside a single text element without a deliberate split.
Don't apply border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't use background-clip text with gradient.
Don't add resting shadows to cards, list rows, panels.
Don't use the SaaS hero-metric template.
Don't stack identical cards in a grid.
Don't use modals as a first thought.
Don't localize away the bakery metaphor.
